name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram Indianapolis, Indiana — MoneyGram is a money transfer service offering domestic and international sending and receiving with 63+ locations acr...
description_long: MoneyGram operates as a global money transfer network with extensive physical locations for consumer convenience. The company enables customers to send and receive money both domestically and internationally through a network of agent locations, including retail partners like Ace Cash Express and CVS pharmacies. Their service model relies on physical locations distributed throughout cities like Indianapolis, where customers can initiate transfers in person. MoneyGram positions itself as a accessible alternative to traditional banking for those needing quick money movement without requiring a bank account. The company offers both online and offline transaction options, allowing flexibility in how customers access their services. Their Indianapolis network includes 63 searchable locations as of the website snapshot, demonstrating significant geographic penetration in the market. The business model generates revenue through transfer fees and currency exchange spreads on international transactions. MoneyGram serves consumers who need point-of-service cash access, international remittance capabilities, and money movement outside traditional banking channels. A key distinction is their agent-based model—they don't operate solely through owned locations but rather partner with existing retailers, reducing operational overhead while increasing accessibility. However, competitors like Western Union offer comparable services with similar fee structures and agent networks. The company faces ongoing pressure from digital payment solutions and fintech platforms offering cheaper, faster international transfers. For cost-conscious consumers, traditional bank wire transfers or emerging digital remittance apps may offer better value despite less convenient physical access.
address: 5550 E Fall Creek Pkwy N Dr, Indianapolis, IN 46226

company_info.headquarters: 5550 E Fall Creek Pkwy N Dr, Indianapolis, IN 46226

pros: 63+ locations in Indianapolis alone, including convenient retail partners like CVS and Ace Cash Express
Extended hours at many locations (some open until 11:30 PM), providing after-hours access to cash services
Both online and offline transaction options for flexibility in how customers send/receive money
International money transfer capability alongside domestic transfers
Minimal friction—customers can walk into nearby retail locations without appointment
Partnership with established retail chains improves brand recognition and accessibility
cons: Website does not display fee structures, making cost comparison difficult for consumers
No specific APR or rate information provided—pricing opacity is a significant limitation
Limited service details on the location search page; cannot determine exact fees before visiting
Faces intense competition from cheaper digital alternatives and traditional bank wire transfers
Agent-based model creates inconsistent customer service quality across locations
best_for: Immigrants and expatriates sending remittances to family internationally
Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing cash access without a bank account
People requiring same-day or quick money transfers to domestic recipients
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked consumers and international remitters who prioritize physical location convenience over competitive pricing. The critical caveat is that fee structures are not transparent on their website, requiring customers to contact locations or visit in person to understand true costs—making price comparison difficult before committing to a transfer.
services: Agent network access through retail partners
